name: mcp-planner
description: Microsoft Planner — plans, buckets, and tasks via Microsoft Graph
long_description: MCP server for Microsoft Planner via the Microsoft Graph API. Find groups and plans, list buckets and tasks, and create, update, assign, complete, or delete tasks — including descriptions and checklists — with Planner's ETag concurrency handled automatically. Uses an Entra ID app registration with application permissions (client-credentials flow).

ms_tenant_id.title: Entra tenant ID
ms_tenant_id.description: Your Microsoft Entra ID (Azure AD) tenant id (GUID or domain)

ms_client_id.title: App registration client ID
ms_client_id.description: Entra ID → App registrations → your app → Application (client) ID

ms_client_secret.title: Client secret
ms_client_secret.description: A client secret for the app registration. The app needs admin-consented application permissions: Tasks.ReadWrite.All, GroupMember.Read.All, User.Read.All

planner_advanced_toolset.title: Advanced toolset (optional)
planner_advanced_toolset.description: Adds graph_get / graph_find_endpoint — read-only access to Graph endpoints the curated tools don't wrap, limited to /planner, /groups, /users.
